text: collaboration.spawn_agent failed with 'no thread with id' during required read-only code review; tool should either create the thread or explain unavailable team state before accepting the call

cargo-modules dependencies --acyclic reports intra-type ownership loops (for example Budget <-> Budget::new) even with --no-owns/--no-fns/--no-types, so module-cycle checks require DOT edge extraction plus tsort
Weak-types cleanup left serde_json::json imported in verify.rs after moving response schema construction; a targeted unused-import scan before the full gate would have caught it.
apply_patch failed because I assumed generated dist-workspace.toml values instead of rereading the exact file; a pre-patch exact-target reminder would have prevented it
Tried passing multiple exact test filters to cargo test; Cargo accepts only one positional TESTNAME. A shared recipe showing module-prefix filtering would prevent this dead end.

cargo modules dependencies --acyclic reports inherent type/method ownership loops even when --no-fns --no-types --no-owns are passed, obscuring actual module-cycle checks; an explicit module-only cycle mode would prevent this dead end
Parallel exec around a long-running repository inventory returned a session without a usable handle in the composed result; separate execs or automatic session draining would prevent lost output.

Full Rust test run can fail because the nonblocking mock listener passes a nonblocking TcpStream to read_request, which panics on WouldBlock; accepted client streams should be switched to blocking or reads should retry.
The initial repo-orientation command used recursive find for AGENTS.md despite shell guidance; a standard parent-walk helper would have prevented the wasted scan.
A broad apply_patch across comment-only files failed on one stale hunk and applied nothing; smaller per-file hunks would have avoided the retry.

Full cargo test intermittently aborted in quick_ask_runs_against_mock_server_and_reports_metered_cost when tests/common MockServer hit WouldBlock; make the mock accept/read loop tolerant or deterministic.
Quoted option bundles in a zsh loop reached cargo-modules as one argument; a shared example using zsh arrays would have prevented the dead-end.
cargo test integration mock server panicked with EAGAIN under parallel test load; a documented serial fallback would prevent false failures
